epigraph: “The early morning has gold in its mouth.” — Franklin

messages.preview: Awesome!  I don’t feel obliged, don’t worry 🙂

Hi Fran
Bringing Thom for me today would be great.
S xx

tasks.text: Brian. Book meeting Prep for Caroline
Get testimonial quote from CEO of Parkinson's UK (on-on-one in two weeks).

lead.headline: Teresa's resignation requires urgent attention before your Cheltenham trip
lead.deck: With a departure scheduled for 11:32 this morning, you need to address this staffing change now rather than from the road. The lack of due dates across your task list suggests this may have been flagged but not yet acted upon.
